tcga.beta_auto_label: CRITICALITY (4/5) -- ARTIFACT of ruler compression at N=1500
tcga.integrated_rationale: Decisive readout is effective rank (template logic: small & size-independent => low-rank). Samples-as-units: 1 dominant eigenvalue ~N then flat MP bulk, only 4-9 spikes, PR 1.11-1.18, spike count NOT growing with N (BRCA N=1218->9, COAD N=329->4). Genes-as-units: eff_rank 25-46/1500 (small), beta 0.010-0.043 -- far below criticality band (a0.6=0.371, noise=0.696), lying in the compressed low-rank/steep-power-law zone where beta cannot separate low-rank from a>=1 at this N. Not criticality (no scale-free cascade in either orientation), not noise (PR<<N).

fmri.integrated_rationale: beta 0.058+/-0.030 sits below the low-rank/criticality midpoint (~0.12 at N=200); 133/139 subjects LOW-RANK by beta. eff_rank median 4 (range 1-8) with N fixed ~200: 1 dominant eigenvalue then flat bulk. Rank stays small (3-8) across T=78-296; corr(eff_rank,T)=0.50 reflects shorter scans resolving fewer spikes, not extensive growth.
